tasks.name: Setup experiment codebase and AADWD optimizer
tasks.description: Implement the core training infrastructure: (1) AADWD optimizer wrapper that computes delta_hat_t, EMA smoothing, and dynamic lambda_t per step; (2) CWD baseline optimizer; (3) Configurable training script for ResNet20, VGG16-BN on CIFAR-10/100 with logging of all metrics (delta_hat_t, lambda_t, weight norm, train/test acc per epoch, per-step samples every 100 steps). Output: JSON-lines log format. Support all 3 AADWD variants (conservative, aggressive, square) and all baselines (no-WD, fixed-WD, stagewise-WD, CWD, random-dynamic-WD, norm-matched-WD).

tasks.name: Tier 0: Alignment proxy reliability diagnostic (H3)
tasks.description: GO/NO-GO gate. Train ResNet20/CIFAR-10 with 4 fixed WD values (1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 3e-3) for 200 epochs. At 9 checkpoints (epochs 20, 50, 80, 100, 120, 150, 170, 190, 200), compute mini-batch alignment (B=128, 50 random batches) and large-batch alignment (B=8192). Compute Pearson r between EMA-smoothed mini-batch and large-batch alignment. Also characterize phase-dependent structure: mean/std of delta_hat_t per training third. Pass criterion: Pearson r > 0.85. Fail action: increase beta to 0.999; if r < 0.6, pivot to cand_empirical.

pilot.pass_criteria: Pearson r > 0.85 between mini-batch EMA(delta_hat_t, beta=0.99) and large-batch delta_t; delta_hat_t shows phase-dependent structure (std > 0.05 across training thirds)
pilot.description: Pilot: Run only 1 fixed WD value (5e-4) for 20 epochs with checkpoint at epochs 5, 10, 15, 20. Quick check that alignment computation works and shows non-trivial variation.

visualizations.description: Mini-batch vs large-batch alignment with Pearson r annotation
Alignment trajectory across training for different WD values

tasks.name: Tier 1: Fixed WD grid search baseline
tasks.description: Train ResNet20/CIFAR-10 with 5 fixed WD values (1e-4, 3e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 3e-3) for 200 epochs, seed=42. Record test acc, train acc, gen gap, weight norm trajectory. Identify the best fixed WD value for comparison. Also train No-WD baseline.

pilot.pass_criteria: Best fixed WD achieves test acc > 91.0% on CIFAR-10/ResNet20 at 200 epochs (sanity check that training pipeline works correctly)
pilot.description: Pilot: Run 2 WD values (5e-4, 1e-3) + No-WD for 20 epochs. Verify training pipeline produces reasonable loss curves.

tasks.name: Tier 1: Stagewise WD and CWD baselines
tasks.description: Train ResNet20/CIFAR-10 with Stagewise-WD (using best fixed lambda_0 from tier1_fixed_wd_grid: first 50% at lambda_0, next 30% at lambda_0/10, last 20% at lambda_0/100) and CWD (sign-based masking with best fixed WD). 200 epochs, seed=42. Record all standard metrics plus alignment trajectory.

pilot.pass_criteria: Both methods produce reasonable training curves (test acc > 90% at 20 epochs pilot)
pilot.description: Pilot: Run Stagewise-WD and CWD for 20 epochs with WD=5e-4.

tasks.name: Tier 1: AADWD 3 variants (Conservative, Aggressive, Square)
tasks.description: Train ResNet20/CIFAR-10 with 3 AADWD variants using c=1.0, beta=0.99, lambda_min=1e-6, lambda_max=0.01. 200 epochs, seed=42. Record full metrics: test acc, train acc, gen gap, weight norm, lambda_t trajectory, delta_hat_t trajectory, EMA(delta_hat_t), cumulative contraction product. Compare against fixed-WD(best) from tier1_fixed_wd_grid.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 3 AADWD variants produce non-degenerate lambda_t (not all clipped to min or max) AND test acc > 85% at 20 epochs
pilot.description: Pilot: Run 3 AADWD variants for 20 epochs. Verify lambda_t varies meaningfully.

visualizations.description: Training loss curves for all methods

tasks.name: Tier 1: Core results analysis and theory verification
tasks.description: Aggregate all Tier 1 results. Compute: (1) 7-method comparison table (No-WD, Fixed-WD-best, Stagewise, CWD, Conservative, Aggressive, Square) x {test acc, gen gap, weight norm}. (2) Delta_bar_T vs delta_max for dynamic vs fixed methods. (3) Implied stability bound ratio. (4) Convergence speed comparison (epochs to reach 90% train acc). Generate all Tier 1 figures and tables.

visualizations.description: Main results: 7 methods comparison on ResNet20/CIFAR-10
Cumulative contraction: Delta_bar_T vs delta_max across training
Implied stability bound ratio (dynamic/fixed) for each AADWD variant

tasks.name: Tier 2: Cross-architecture validation (CIFAR-100, VGG16)
tasks.description: Run best AADWD variant (from tier1_analysis) + Fixed-WD-best + CWD + No-WD on: (1) ResNet20/CIFAR-100, (2) VGG16-BN/CIFAR-10. 200 epochs, seed=42. Verify AADWD generalizes across architectures and datasets.

pilot.pass_criteria: AADWD produces non-degenerate lambda_t on both new settings AND test acc within 2% of fixed-WD-best at 20 epochs
pilot.description: Pilot: Run best AADWD + Fixed-WD on ResNet20/CIFAR-100 and VGG16-BN/CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs.

tasks.name: Tier 2: Hyperparameter sensitivity (c and beta ablation)
tasks.description: On ResNet20/CIFAR-10, run best AADWD variant with: (1) c in {0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0} with fixed beta=0.99; (2) beta in {0.9, 0.99, 0.999} with best c. 200 epochs, seed=42. Also run fixed-WD with lambda in {1e-4, 3e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 3e-3} (reuse from tier1_fixed_wd_grid). Compare plateau widths: range of c achieving >99% of best acc vs range of lambda achieving same.

pilot.pass_criteria: All c values produce non-degenerate training (test acc > 80% at 20 epochs)
pilot.description: Pilot: Run c in {0.25, 1.0, 2.0} for 20 epochs.

visualizations.description: Hyperparameter sensitivity: test acc vs c (AADWD) and test acc vs lambda (fixed WD)
EMA decay ablation: test acc vs beta

tasks.name: Tier 2: Critical ablations (H5 — alignment vs time-variation)
tasks.description: On ResNet20/CIFAR-10, run 3 ablation controls alongside best AADWD variant: (1) Random-Dynamic-WD: replace delta_hat_t with U[0,1], same temporal statistics. (2) Norm-Matched-WD: fixed lambda adjusted per epoch to match AADWD ||w_t|| trajectory. (3) Equivalent-Cumulative-WD: fixed lambda = mean(lambda_t) from AADWD run. 200 epochs, seed=42. H5 test: AADWD should outperform Random-Dynamic by >= 0.3%.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 3 ablation methods produce valid training curves (no NaN, test acc > 80% at 20 epochs)
pilot.description: Pilot: Run Random-Dynamic-WD and Equiv-Cumulative-WD for 20 epochs.

visualizations.description: Ablation comparison: AADWD vs Random-Dynamic vs Norm-Matched vs Equiv-Cumulative
Weight norm trajectories across ablation methods

tasks.name: Final analysis: aggregate all results and generate paper figures
tasks.description: Aggregate all Tier 0-2 results. Generate final versions of all tables and figures for the paper. Compute summary statistics: (1) Delta_bar_T improvement over delta_max across all settings. (2) Plateau width ratio for hyperparameter sensitivity. (3) Alignment characterization across architectures. (4) Effect size of alignment signal vs random baseline (H5). Write results summary.

visualizations.description: Complete results table: all methods × all settings
Training loss convergence comparison across all methods
